task_completion.description: Verify the required columns are added to the Inventory sheet.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet application is open showing the 'Inventory' sheet. New column headers 'Annual_Value', 'Cumulative_Value', 'Cumulative_Pct', and 'ABC_Class' are visible.

task_completion.description: Verify Annual Value is calculated and the data is sorted descending by this value.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Annual_Value' column contains calculated numerical values. The rows are visibly sorted in descending order based on this column (the largest numbers are at the top).

task_completion.description: Verify Cumulative Value and Cumulative Percentage are calculated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Cumulative_Value' column shows numbers increasing row by row. The 'Cumulative_Pct' column shows values formatted as percentages (e.g., 15%, 25%) that increase down the column.

task_completion.description: Verify items are assigned an ABC class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'ABC_Class' column contains the letters 'A', 'B', or 'C'. The top rows should be assigned 'A'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Summary sheet is created with the correct headers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A sheet tab named 'Summary' is visible and active. Cells A1 and B1 contain the exact text 'Class' and 'Item_Count'.

task_completion.description: Verify the Summary sheet contains the counts for each ABC class.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Summary' sheet shows rows for classes 'A', 'B', and 'C' with corresponding integer counts in the 'Item_Count' column.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a spreadsheet GUI application (like LibreOffice Calc) to perform the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent interacting with a spreadsheet graphical user interface, not just writing a Python/pandas script in a terminal or text editor.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used spreadsheet formulas rather than hardcoding answers.
integrity.visual_evidence: When a cell is selected, the formula bar shows spreadsheet formulas (e.g., multiplication, SUM, IF, COUNTIF) rather than static, pre-calculated numbers.

integrity.description: Verify the agent modified the target file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window title or save dialog shows the file being worked on is 'inventory_abc_analysis.xlsx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target file: /home/ga/Documents/inventory_abc_analysis.xlsx. Expected sheets: 'Inventory' and 'Summary'. Required new columns in Inventory: 'Annual_Value', 'Cumulative_Value', 'Cumulative_Pct', 'ABC_Class'. ABC classification thresholds: Class A <= 80% (0.8), Class B <= 95% (0.95), Class C > 95%.
